qa_pairs.question: Are extensions available for the submission deadline of Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) applications?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the submission deadline for Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) applications is final, and no extensions or late submissions will be accepted.

qa_pairs.question: When can applicants expect to be notified about the results of their Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application?
qa_pairs.answer: All applicants will be notified of their Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) results in March.

qa_pairs.question: How are successful Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) applicants notified, and is this information made public?
qa_pairs.answer: Successful applicants are first contacted by email with any additional information or action items required to finalize their allocation. Once all recipients have been privately notified, a list of recipients, project allocation amounts, and allocation values will be published on the RAC Annual Reports page.
